description_long: This is a green tractor with a robust, boxy body and a high, enclosed operator cabin featuring large blue-tinted windows on all sides. The tractor has two large rear wheels with deep treads and yellow rims, and two smaller front wheels, also with yellow rims, designed for stability and traction on various terrains. The front of the tractor displays a prominent hood with vent details and headlights, while the rear includes a hitch mechanism for attaching implements. Side mirrors and a sturdy roof provide additional safety and comfort for the operator. The overall design is functional and durable, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban or rural environments.
description: A green tractor with a high, enclosed cabin, large rear wheels, and a sturdy, functional design with yellow accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent hood, headlights, front wheels, and the wide windshield with side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large rear wheel, smaller front wheel, blue-tinted windows, and the exhaust pipe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the hitch mechanism, rear lights, and the back window of the enclosed cabin.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the large rear wheel, smaller front wheel, and cabin details.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four wheels; larger rear wheels, smaller front wheels; likely four-wheel drive
attribute_cabin_design: Enclosed cabin with large blue-tinted windows, roof, side mirrors, and likely doors; provides operator protection and comfort
